business_quality: Hybrid AI cloud and bitcoin infrastructure platform with real power assets and accelerating AI ambition.
growth_durability: Moderate because the AI build-out is promising but the business still carries bitcoin-linked cyclicality.
key_risks: Execution risk, customer concentration, financing complexity, and continued overlap with crypto economics.
valuation_context: More optionality than stability; attractive if AI conversion keeps working, but still a higher-risk setup than pure-play AI cloud names.
notes: Score inputs use normalized workflow values so the name can be compared alongside more mature growth infrastructure companies.
